getconnectedPromo.heading: ⭐ Share Your Opinions, Claim Your Reward! ⭐
getconnectedPromo.p1: Ready to shape the future of digital learning? Take our quick survey and let us know your thoughts! As a token of our appreciation, we're offering a $25 gift card to thank you for your time.
getconnectedPromo.p2: Simply click the link below to get started, and your survey will pop up in a new tab.
getconnectedPromo.p3: Please note: This survey is conducted independently; any information you choose to share is neither associated with the Public Library Association (PLA) nor does PLA bear responsibility for it.
getconnectedPromo.p4: Thank you for being a part of our learning community! Let's make learning better, together. 💡

banner.heading: Start Here!
banner.description: Based on your answers, we will be able to recommend what courses might be of interest for you so that you can learn what you need quickly and easily.

survey.recommendedCoursesPlaceholder: Your personalized course recommendations will appear here.
survey.instructions: Answer three questions and we'll recommend which courses to take.
